text.title: Reasoning-First Architectures — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the YAML shape of `reasoning-routing.yaml` — declarative routing spec consumed by the orchestrator.

forbidden.pattern: single global thinking_budget for all task_types (r2-task-type-budget)
classifier absent — all requests route directly to a reasoning model (r3-classifier-first)
human_gate.enabled=false AND actions includes any of {deploy, payment, delete} (r4-human-gate-irreversible)
thinking_budget < 1024 for task_type ∈ {planning, research} — under-budget on hard task

allowed-transformations.transformation: Adjust thinking_budget within ±2x as long as eval gate still passes.
Swap reasoning provider (o3 ↔ Claude ET) is major version bump with new eval evidence.
Adding a task_type is patch bump if classifier already differentiates it.

list.item: ≥2 task_types declared with route + thinking_budget + fallback
human_gate.enabled == true if any irreversible action listed
thinking_budget within 1K-128K, sized per task-type bucket
